atlas v0.9
返回网页家族 / Back To Families

网页家族 / Contemporary Web Family

舞台叙事展示型 Stage-Driven Showcase

首屏像舞台或镜头，一张图或一个场景先建立世界，再把内容逐层展开。

历史源头 / Historical Roots

装饰艺术 / Art Deco赛博朋克 / 科技未来 / Cyberpunk / Techno-Futurism

适配结构 / Structure Fit

沉浸舞台型 / Immersive Stage专题长文型 / Dossier / Feature

真实样本 / Sample Gallery

真实网站样本 / Live Website Samples

从真实站点看这条家族是怎样落地的。

借法 / Interpretation

借这条家族的语法，不只模仿表面 / Borrow the grammar, not only the surface

识别特征 / Signature

  • single-scene drama
  • low-density first fold
  • strong visual memory
  • clear reveal into deeper layers

可借语法 / Borrow

  • one dominant scene at the top
  • sparse copy over a strong image
  • clear exits into deeper content

适合内容 / Best For

  • campaigns
  • flagship launches
  • film and entertainment
  • portfolio hero moments

不适合时机 / Avoid When

  • the homepage must explain many parallel options
  • users need scanning more than immersion

页面模式 / Page Patterns

这条家族常见会长成哪些页面组织 / The page patterns this family commonly becomes

页面模式 / Page Pattern

live

沉浸场景首屏型 Immersive Stage Scene

A single scene or atmosphere owns the top of the page, then hands off into deeper content with controlled exits.

识别信号 / Cues

one dominant visual worldsparse copy over imagerystrong first-fold memory

页面模式 / Page Pattern

live

产品演示说明型 Product Demo Explainer

Screenshots or staged scenes explain behavior or value, with copy framing the outcome and next action.

识别信号 / Cues

hero screenshot or product scenebenefit-led copyclear task hierarchy

历史源头 / Historical Roots

如果你喜欢这类网页，往前追会遇到哪几支 / Trace the earlier lineages behind it

1920s-1930s

France / Europe / US

装饰艺术 Art Deco

不少文化、时尚和奢侈品牌网站，会借 Art Deco 的舞台感、对称感和精致节奏。

今天会在网页里变成 / Shows Up In

静奢生活方式型 / Quiet Lifestyle Editorial舞台叙事展示型 / Stage-Driven Showcase
查看流派 / Open Movement

1980s-present

Science fiction / game and tech culture

赛博朋克 / 科技未来 Cyberpunk / Techno-Futurism

今天的游戏、硬件、沉浸式产品页和一些 AI / tech brand，会借这种未来主义张力来强化世界观。

今天会在网页里变成 / Shows Up In

霓虹未来科技型 / Neon Techno-Futurist Interface舞台叙事展示型 / Stage-Driven Showcase
查看流派 / Open Movement

Prompt 风格包 / Prompt DNA

可以直接给 agent 的风格包 / A ready-to-use prompt packet

Prompt 风格包 / Prompt DNA

舞台叙事展示型 Stage-Driven Showcase

Use a stage-driven showcase: let one scene dominate the fold, keep copy sparse, and reveal depth only after the first-image moment is established.

参考链接 / Reference Packet

  • Apple MacBook Pro
  • Nowness
